SPARQL SELECT ?s, bif:st_xmax(?o) as ?xmax FROM <http://geo-api-test/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER (?s IN (<point2d>, <point4d>, <box1>, <linestring>, <polygon1>, <polygon2>, <polygon3>, <multipolygon>, <collection>)) };
SPARQL SELECT ?s, bif:st_xmax(?o) as ?xmax FROM <http://geo-api-test/> WHERE { { SELECT ?s ?o WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?s ?p ?o FILTER(isBlank(?o)) } } };
SPARQL SELECT ?s, bif:st_xmax(?o) as ?xmax FROM <http://geo-api-test/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . ?o a <http://www.openlinksw.com/schemas/virtrdf#Geometry> };
SPARQL SELECT ?s, bif:st_xmax(?o) as ?xmax FROM <http://geo-api-test/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . ?o a <http://www.openlinksw.com/schemas/virtrdf#Geometry> . FILTER(bif:st_xmax(?o) > 2) };

SPARQL SELECT ?s, bif:st_xmax(?o) as ?xmax FROM <http://geo-api-test/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . ?o a <http://www.openlinksw.com/schemas/virtrdf#Geometry> . { SELECT ?length WHERE { <linestring> a <http://www.openlinksw.com/schemas/virtrdf#Geometry> . BIND(bif:st_length(?length) AS ?l) } }};
SPARQL SELECT ?s, bif:st_xmax(?o) as ?xmax FROM <http://geo-api-test/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . OPTIONAL { ?s <http://example.org/relatedTo> ?related . } };
